mapper.insert:
SELECT 'F' || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SUBSTR(MAX(ATCH_FILE_CD),2)+1,'0000000000')) FROM ATCH_FILE
INSERT INTO ATCH_FILE(ATCH_FILE_CD, ATCH_FILE_ENDT) VALUES(#{atchFileCd}, sysdate)

INSERT INTO ATCH_FILE_DETAIL(ATCH_FILE_CD, ATCH_FILE_DETAIL_SEQ, ATCH_FILE_DETAIL_ORLNG, ATCH_FILE_DETAIL_SAVENM, ATCH_FILE_DETAIL_EXT, ATCH_FILE_DETAIL_PATH) VALUES(#{atchFileCd}, 1, #{atchFileDetailOrlng}, #{atchFileDetailSavenm}, #{atchFileDetailExt}, #{atchFileDetailPath})
